name: opsrabbit-plugin-platform
description: Public SDK and developer CLI for OpsRabbit plugins

scripts.check: pnpm boundary:check && pnpm --filter @opsrabbit/plugin-sdk check && pnpm --filter @opsrabbit/plugin-sdk build && pnpm --filter @opsrabbit/create-plugin check
scripts.quality: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm check && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm build && pnpm packages:verify && pnpm starters:verify
